features: LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE TO CREATE A WELCOMING ATMOSPHERE: Experience the smooth blend of white vanilla sprinkled with the essence of fresh coconut and a touch of white magnolia and musk

INFUSED WITH ESSENTIAL OILS: Surround yourself in the inviting scents of nature-inspired fragrances, infused with natural essential oils which neutralise malodours in the kitchen, bathroom and living room
RELAXING AMBIENCE, ANY TIME OF DAY: Place on flat heat-resistant surface, and enjoy the relaxing scents of Airwick
description: Product Description Experience the smooth blend of white vanilla sprinkled with essence of fresh coconut and a touch of white magnolia and musk. Discover AIR WICK Essential Oils, a range of fragrances that have been inspired by natural essences extracted from fruits, owners & plants to help create the mood you want for your home. This scented candle is designed to delicately infuse the fragrance throughout your home from the first to the last burn, while the classic design looks fantastic in any room. Simply place it on a flat, heatproof surface and light the wick to release the subtle scent, then relax as the sensual fragrance begins to infuse your room. Safety Warning Always place the candle on a flat, heat-resistant surface. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Keep the candle away from flammable materials. Do not burn the candle for more than 4 hours at a time. Always extinguish the candle when leaving the room or going to sleep. Allow the candle to cool before re-lighting. Properly dispose of candle remnants.
